title: sclarea rhodantha
intro: Sclarea rhodantha, also known as the pink clary sage or rhodantha clary sage, is a flowering plant species in the family Lamiaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of sclarea rhodantha include its ability to relieve muscle spasms, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote better sleep. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
